title: Allow multiple events to be created for a single item with google calendar automation
excerpt: We have multiple events related to one item on a Monday board. It would be so helpful if we could use the google calendar automation templates to automatically add not just one but multiple events to the calendar that ar…

posts.author: Creative_DiscoCubes (Creative)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have multiple events related to one item on a Monday board. It would be so helpful if we could use the google calendar automation templates to automatically add not just one but multiple events to the calendar that are all attached to one item.

For our delivery service, our use case would be “Delivery Time” and “Event Time”. Another example for our photo studio would be “Shoot Date”, “R1 Edits Due”, and “R2 Edits Due”.

We love the google calendar automation templates, wish we could use it for everything we need it for.
